name: barcode-generator-smoke-tests
description: Automated smoke tests for the 10-language barcode generator (Playwright).

scripts.test:full: npm run test:comprehensive && npm run test:review
scripts.test:launch: npm run test:launch:seo && npm run test:launch:public && npm run test:launch:tools && npm run test:launch:account
scripts.test:launch:seo: playwright test tests/domain-ads-config.spec.js tests/seo.spec.js tests/guide-seo.spec.js tests/decoder-seo.spec.js tests/a11y.spec.js tests/production-crawl.spec.js --project=chromium --workers=1
scripts.test:launch:public: playwright test tests/ean13-inline.spec.js tests/format-inline.spec.js tests/popular-gallery.spec.js tests/smoke.spec.js tests/decoder-generator-flow.spec.js tests/decoder-batch-image.spec.js tests/high-contrast.spec.js tests/pwa.spec.js --project=chromium --workers=1
scripts.test:launch:tools: playwright test tests/print-layout.spec.js tests/bulk.spec.js tests/gs1.spec.js tests/two-d.spec.js tests/consent.spec.js --project=chromium --workers=1
scripts.test:launch:account: playwright test tests/m25-account.spec.js tests/account-lifecycle.spec.js tests/auth-save.spec.js tests/save-shortcut.spec.js tests/bulk-account.spec.js tests/codes-filter.spec.js tests/job-history.spec.js tests/product-catalog.spec.js tests/template-duplicate.spec.js tests/account-analytics.spec.js tests/account-dialogs.spec.js tests/public-share-ui.spec.js tests/public-share.spec.js tests/phase4-agent.spec.js --project=chromium --workers=1
